_comment_1: Parser is 'react' — Jinja side isn't Code-Connect-parseable but mirrors this library 1:1 (see jinja/macros/all.html).
_comment_2: When the Figma file exists: replace TBD_FILE_KEY in figma.code-connect.ts and in documentUrlSubstitutions with the real file key, and the TBD-<SLUG> node ids with real node-ids.
_comment_3: Publish: cd react && npm install && npm run cc:publish (requires FIGMA_TOKEN env var).
